profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Wira Global Solusi Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the information technology industry in Indonesia. The company operates in two segments, Programming Services and Software Development; and Consultancy Services. It also engages in the wholesale and retail trading of communication and information products; real estate, and professional, scientific and technical activities; and financial and investment activities. PT Wira Global Solusi Tbk was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Cempaka Putih, Indonesia.
